mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO learning_goals (user_id, title, goal_type, end_date, start_date, status, estimated_hours, actual_hours) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.title}, #{item.goalType}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.status}, #{item.estimatedHours}, #{item.actualHours})

insert into goal_tasks (goal_id, title, sort_order, estimated_hours, actual_hours, status) values
(#{item.goalId}, #{item.title}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.estimatedHours}, #{item.actualHours}, #{item.status})
mapper.update: update learning_goals set actual_hours = #{hours} where id = #{goalId}
update goal_tasks set actual_hours = #{hours} where id = #{taskId}
update goal_tasks set estimated_hours = #{hours} where id = #{taskId}
update learning_goals set status = 1 where id = #{goalId}
update goal_tasks set status = 1 where id = #{taskId}
update learning_goals set end_date = #{endDate} where id = #{goalId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from learning_goals where user_id = #{userId} and status = 0;
